name: Sensu Go
description: Event-driven monitoring and observability pipeline for multi-cloud and hybrid infrastructure.

seo.title: Sensu Go — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: Sensu Go: Event-driven monitoring and observability pipeline for multi-cloud and hybrid infrastructure.

when_to_use: Event-driven monitoring for hybrid cloud infrastructure
Agent-based multi-cloud and on-prem metric collection
Dynamic runtime assets for portable check execution

pros: Pipeline model flexible for hybrid infra
Sumo Logic backing adds enterprise support
cons: Sumo Logic acquisition slowed OSS momentum
review.verdict: Solid option for hybrid-infra event monitoring, but Prometheus dominates cloud-native attention and community.
review.best_for: Hybrid infrastructure teams needing event-driven monitoring across cloud and on-prem.
review.not_for: Cloud-native teams already standardized on Prometheus and Grafana.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence
